message:
build(brave-search,deepgram): add reqwest and url dependencies for API scaffolds

Add reqwest with json feature and url crate to brave-search and deepgram
connector Cargo.toml files. Update Cargo.lock with workspace dependency
resolution for new crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2306,6 +2306,21 @@ dependencies = [
  "wiremock",
 ]

+version = "0.1.0"

+ "fcp-core",
+ "reqwest 0.13.2",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "tracing",

+ "url",
